Exam: Targeted diagnostic imaging
History: Motor vehide collision with multi-site soft tissue injury complaints.
Findings:
Imaging of the mixed demonstrates findings which may represent post-traumatic changes. No acute osseous
abnormality. Correlate with ongoing symptoms.
Impression:
No acute osseous abnormality. Correlate with ongoing symptoms.
Correlation with referring clinical history is recommended. Recommend follow-up imaging if symptoms persist.

MEDICAL RECORD PG000004
Discharge Instructions

Community General Hospital

1516 East Valley Blvd

Glendale, CA 91203

Phone: (526) 555-7004 Fax: (687) 555-7886

NPI: 1897312271

Facility: Community General Hospital

FIN: ENC-949996

MRN: 3293526

DISCHARGE INSTRUCTIONS.

Date: 2/12/24

Diagnosis: Soft tissue strain after motor vehicle collision.
Instructions:

- Apply ice to mixed for 20 minutes every 2 hours

- Rest and avoid strenuous activity

- Take medications as prescribed

- Use sling/brace as directed

Medications Prescribed:

- Ibuprofen 600 mg PO TID with food

- Cyclobenzaprine 10 mg PO TID PRN muscle spasm

- Acetaminophen 500 mg PO Q6H PRN

Follow-Up:

- Orthopedic/specialist follow-up within 3-5 days

- Return to ER if symptoms worsen

Return Precautions:

- Increasing pain not controlled by medication

- Numbness, tingling, or weakness

- Fever > 101F

Patient verbalized understanding of instructions.
Discharge RN: J. Martinez, RN

Encounter ID: ENC-949996 | Electronically signed by Dr. James Chen
Produced by Community General Hospital for Smith & Keller LLP PG000004

Emergency Physician Note

Facility: Community General Hospital

FIN: ENC-949996

MRN: 3293526

Provider: Dr. James Chen

Date of Service: 2/12/24

ED NOTE

CC: Neck, back, and generalized pain after the incident.

HPI:

Pt presents to the ED after Motor vehide collision with multi-site soft tissue injury complaints. C/o mixed pain, onset
at time of incident. Denies LOC, paresthesias, weakness. No h/o prior mixed injury.

PMH: HTN, DM2

MEDS:

See MAR

ALLERGIES: NKDA

PE

Pain-limited range of motion with paraspinal tenderness documented on examination.

AIP:

1. Soft tissue strain after motor vehicle collision.

2. Discharged home with conservative care instructions and outpatient follow-up.

3. Anatgesics provided, RTC precautions reviewed.

Dictated but not read.

/s/ Dr. James Chen

2/12/24

Electronically signed by Dr. James Chen

Primary Care Follow-Up Visit

Reason for Visit: Follow-up for persistent pain, mobility loss, and treatment response.

Current Symptoms: Neck, back, and generalized pain after the incident.

Functional Limitation: Ongoing limitations with lifting, overhead activity, sleep, and household tasks were reported.
Objective: Follow-up examination and treatment response were documented.

CC: Neck, back, and generalized pain after the incident,
HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS:
Since the er visit on 02/ 12/2024 with Dr. James Chen at Community General Hospital, symptoms have remained
under review. Patient returns for follow-up of Soft tissue strain after motor vehicle collision. Reports ongoing
symptoms with partial improvement. Current medications include:
1. Medication reconciliation performed
2. Patient reports intermittent NSAID use with partial relief
ALLERGIES: NKDA
PHYSICAL EXAMINATION:
Pain-limited range of motion with paraspinal tenderness documented on examination.

Soft tissue strain after motor vehicle Collision,
PLAN:
1. Continue current medications
2. Continue physical therapy
3. Follow-up in 4-6 weeks
4. Activity modification as previously discussed
